case_title: CITY COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS CALZOLAI, FRANCO et al

docket_entries.description: PLTF MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED. FEE EXEMPT. TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER. (WAITING FOR FILE FROM STORAGE)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,718.00 FILED BY CITY  COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT CALZOLAI, FRANCO CALZOLAI, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY  COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALZOLAI, FRANCO CALZOLAI, MARIA $2,718.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,744.00, DEFENDANT MARIA CALZOLAI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALZOLAI, FRANCO
SYSTEM WON'T ACCEPT 2ND POS"POS ON FILE.. "
PER COMM LYONS, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT JUDGMENT RENDERED 5/6/99 AGAINST FRANCO CALZOLAI, ET AL; BE VACATED. DISMISSAL TO BE ENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC.
CASE OFF CALENDARED. PLAINTIFF CAN PREPARE A STIPULATION/ORDER TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT.
ORDER TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY LARRY STEPHENS, FOR PLTF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. SUBMITTED TO COMMISSIONER.
